About Me

Designing with
purpose & precision

I'm a Graphic Designer and Digital Marketer based in Alexandria, Egypt. Currently enrolled in the Digital Marketing Track at ITI, I combine visual design expertise with a deep understanding of digital platforms and audience psychology.

My background in nursing has sharpened my attention to detail, empathy, and ability to communicate complex ideas simply — qualities that translate powerfully into design. I specialize in creating campaigns that feel both culturally resonant and visually arresting.

    Digital Marketing

    Strategy & Campaigns

    KHEM
    Ancient Egypt · Modern Fashion
    𓂀
    Brand Overview

    A premium clothing brand inspired by ancient Egyptian pharaohs — transforming Pharaonic symbols into modern, distinctive fashion. Targets youth seeking uniqueness and cultural pride.

    Group Project 5 Members My Role: STP + Content Plan
    STP Model
    Segmentation

    Youth 18–35 · Urban Egypt · Heritage lovers · Gen Z fashion seekers · Foreign culture fans · Middle to high income

    Targeting

    Gen Z Males & Females (18–25) · Cultural Pride Seekers (25–35) · Foreign travelers fascinated by Egypt

    Positioning

    Premium fashion blending ancient Egyptian heritage with modern design — express pride, identity, and creativity

    Content Plan (6 Posts — My Contribution)
    POST 01 · Brand Launch

    Teaser reveal — mystery hoodie with Eye of Horus glow. Build intrigue before launch day.

    POST 02 · Storytelling

    The story behind the symbol — educating the audience about the Pharaonic design on each piece.

    POST 03 · Product Showcase

    Lifestyle shot of the hoodie in Cairo streets — merging ancient identity with modern setting.

    POST 04 · Engagement

    Poll: "Which Pharaonic symbol speaks to you?" — drives interaction and builds community.

    POST 05 · Social Proof

    UGC repost + testimonial — building trust with new audience through real customer stories.

    POST 06 · Artist Collab Tease

    Hint at upcoming artist collaboration — fueling excitement toward SMART objective #4.

    BUSY BOARD
    Social Media Management

    Managed and ran the social media presence for Busy Board for Kids — an educational toy brand targeting mothers who value child development. Created content, managed posts, and drove engagement across three platforms.

    3
    Platforms
    50%
    Discount Campaign
    B2C
    Direct to Moms
    Platforms Managed
    📸 Instagram 📘 Facebook 🎵 TikTok
    Target Persona — Sarah Magdy
    Who

    Female doctor, 25, married mother of 1 · Alexandria

    Goal

    Safe educational toy · reduce screen time · save time

    Pain Points

    Safety concerns · budget · fear toy becomes boring

    Channel

    Instagram reels · parenting pages · mom influencers

    Designed Social Post

    50% Off promotional ad — playful, child-friendly aesthetic targeting Egyptian mothers on social media.

    What I Do

    Services & Expertise

    01
    Visual Design

    Posters, banners, social media graphics, and print materials crafted with Adobe Photoshop & Illustrator — attention to hierarchy, color, and composition.

    02
    Brand Identity

    Logo design, business cards, and cohesive visual systems that communicate a brand's personality across every touchpoint.

    03
    Social Media Marketing

    Content strategy, content calendars, platform-specific design (Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, YouTube), and targeted campaign planning.

    04
    Campaign Design

    End-to-end promotional campaigns from concept to execution — identifying objectives, audience, creative direction, and deliverables.

    05
    Exhibition & Event

    Promotional material for cultural events, exhibitions, and museum experiences — bilingual Arabic/English design with cultural sensitivity.

    06
    Digital Marketing

    Competitor analysis, audience research, marketing objectives, and data-driven creative decisions aligned with business goals.
